scripts.dev:web: node scripts/with-root-env.mjs npm run dev -w apps/web
scripts.dev:voice: node scripts/with-root-env.mjs npm run dev -w apps/voice
scripts.build:web: node scripts/with-root-env.mjs npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.db:generate:web: node scripts/with-root-env.mjs npm run db:generate -w apps/web
scripts.db:push:web: node scripts/with-root-env.mjs npm run db:push -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w apps/voice && npm run test -w apps/web
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run build
